summary: Iteration 2 testing of Patrika Director Office Visit app. Backend: extended pytest suite to 29 tests (all passing) covering the new GET /api/dashboard/aggregate endpoint with scope=admin_all / admin_user / self, KPI structure, user_id filter behaviour, recovery ageing buckets (0-30, 31-60, 61-90, 90+) plus English-output verification for AI segment analyze and executive summary (English headings: 'Key Findings', 'Root Causes', 'Executive Snapshot', 'Critical Issues', 'Growth Opportunities'). Frontend: Global Dashboard at /dashboard renders 8 KPI cards (Total Daily Copies, Combined Growth, Total Monthly Revenue, Total Outstanding, Combined Ad Target, Combined Achievement, Weak Agents (Total), Lost Clients (Total)), 4 recharts (branch comparison + ageing), branch-by-branch table with agg-row-{id} for 2 seeded Bikaner visits, user-filter-select dropdown for admin (scope label 'admin all'). Visits list has visits-user-filter (admin). Visit Detail > Daily Summary tab renders 4 DynamicLists (top_issues, worst_5_performers, top_opportunities, immediate_actions) each with Add Another button and per-row trash icon — verified by visible 6-row TOP ISSUES list and presence of top_issues-add-btn, worst_5_performers-add-btn, top_opportunities-add-btn, immediate_actions-add-btn data-testids. Toast now bottom-right and no longer blocks logout. Confirmed all UI text on Login/Visits/VisitDetail (incl. all 11 tabs DASHBOARD, EXECUTIVE, BRANCH HEAD, CIRCULATION, AGENT, HAWKER, CORRESPONDENT, ADVT. TEAM, AD AGENCY, RECOVERY, DAILY SUMMARY) is pure English; zero Devanagari characters and zero Hinglish keywords (karein/nahi/kya/kaise/kyun/hain) detected on rendered DOM.

issues: KPI data-testids are auto-generated from label slugs (e.g. agg-kpi-total-daily-copies, agg-kpi-combined-growth, agg-kpi-weak-agents-total). Review request listed simpler ids like agg-kpi-daily-copies, agg-kpi-growth, agg-kpi-visits. There is no agg-kpi-visits — the visit count is rendered as plain text 'Showing N visits · scope: ...'. Consider stable explicit testids if downstream automation relies on them.

action_items: (Optional) Use explicit stable data-testids on GlobalDashboard KPI cards instead of label-derived slugs, and add an explicit agg-kpi-visits card or testid for visit count if downstream automation expects it.

(Optional) Verify that the seeded Bikaner visits used in the screenshots have actual branch_head.daily_copies populated — they currently show 0 in the aggregated KPI even though the backend computes from raw values (test data appears empty on those segments).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py grew to 727 lines — still acceptable but starting to warrant routers/{dashboard,ai,auth,users,visits,schemas}.py split.
Fixed minor Hinglish leak in /app/frontend/src/components/Dashboard.jsx line 162: 'Koi weak agent record nahi.' replaced with 'No weak agent records.' to honour the pure-English UI requirement.

/api/dashboard/aggregate fetches up to 2000 visits with full segment payloads in a single Mongo call — fine for now but consider $project/$facet aggregation pipeline when visit count or per-visit segment size grows.
CORS allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True remains invalid per spec — same finding from iteration 1.
GlobalDashboard.jsx KPI testid generation .replace(/[^a-z0-9-]/g, '') strips parentheses silently — fine but the resulting ids are fragile to copy changes; prefer explicit ids per card.
DynamicList component correctly renders min initial rows (5-6) and Add Another extends beyond min; remove (trash) icons present per row. Behaviour verified.

success_rate.frontend: ~98% (all critical flows verified; only minor cosmetic testid-naming observation)

test_credentials: admin@patrika.com / admin123 (seeded). Non-admin users created via /api/users by admin.
seed_data_creation: Tests use TEST_ prefix for all created visits/users and clean up at end via test_zz_cleanup_* fixtures. Recovery-ageing test inserts 4 TEST_ parties (A/B/C/D) into the existing TEST_Jaipur visit's recovery segment before assertion.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend suite at /app/backend/tests/test_patrika_api.py — pytest ~110s (AI tests dominate). New endpoint GET /api/dashboard/aggregate covered by test_aggregate_dashboard_admin_all / admin_user_filter / user_self / user_id_param_ignored_for_non_admin / recovery_ageing_buckets. Frontend GlobalDashboard KPI data-testids follow pattern agg-kpi-{slug-of-label} (not the simpler names hinted in the review brief). DynamicList rows on Daily Summary use data-testid '{key}-{index}' (e.g. top_issues-0..N) and the Add button is '{key}-add-btn'. Toast is now bottom-right and no longer blocks logout-btn.
rca of the issue: No bugs to RCA this iteration. The earlier toast/logout overlap from iteration 1 has been remediated (Sonner Toaster moved to bottom-right, confirmed in screenshot showing 'Login successful' bottom-right while logout-btn remained clickable).
